texto: Incredibly, oil and gas companies don't have to pay certain environmental costs that amount to small change to them, while an offshore wind project start-up is faced with fees that could mean the difference between building a wind farm and packing up and going home.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Chellie Pingree sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Incredibly, oil and gas companies don't have to pay certain environmental costs that amount to sm…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, change, home, útil em momentos de mudanca e home.
